steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What sound does the big animal make?
What does the animal like to eat?
questions.hint: It's green and grows in fields!

questions.question_text: What is a baby animal called?
questions.hint: It starts with 'C' and is not a baby dog!

items.definition: Person who takes care of animals

items.example: That is a cow. It says Moo!

steps.title: On the Farm
steps.text: Look at the big farm. That is a cow. It says Moo. Is that a horse? Yes, it is! The farmer smiles.

steps.explanation: Use 'That is' for something far away.

steps.audio_text: Look at the big cow on the farm. The farmer is giving it some grass. Listen, the horse nearby is eating too!

questions.question: What is the farmer giving to the cow?

steps.prompt: Point and Say: That is a horse.

questions.question_text: What animal makes the sound Moo? (Vocabulary question)
That is a ___. (Fill in the blank grammar)
True or False: The farmer works on the farm.
What does the farmer give to the cow? (Reading comprehension)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What color are the sheep on the farm? 🐑
What sound do ducks make? 🦆
questions.hint: It rhymes with back and sack!

questions.question_text: What do you see in a pond with ducks? 🐦⛵
questions.hint: It's something you can swim in and drink!

items.example: That is a sheep. It says baa.
Is that a duck? It says quack.

steps.title: Fun on the Farm
steps.text: That is a white sheep. Is that a duck? Yes, the duck can swim. It says quack! I love animals.

steps.explanation: Use to say what an animal is.

steps.audio_text: Look, there's a white sheep under the tree. Is that sheep saying baa? Yes, it says baa!

questions.question: What sound does the sheep make?

questions.question_text: Is that a ___? (Grammar question)
What color are sheep usually? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: Ducks can swim.
Which animal says 'baa'? (Comprehension question)
What do ducks do in the water?

lessons.title: Pig and Chicken
lessons.topic: Birds, pigs and animal sound recognition

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal on the farm is pink and loves mud?
questions.hint: This animal rolls in the mud to stay cool.

questions.question_text: Which bird makes a sound and wakes up the farmer?
What does a cow say on the farm?
questions.hint: This sound is much louder than a cluck.

items.example: That is a pig. It says Oink.
Is that a chicken? It says Cluck.
That is an egg from a chicken.
Look at the mud! Is that a pig in it?

steps.title: Farm Friends
steps.text: Look at the pig. It is very pink. The pig is in the mud. That is a chicken. Is that a chicken egg? The egg is big!

steps.explanation: Say what sound an animal makes.

steps.audio_text: Look at the chicken! That is a chicken laying an egg. The pig is happy playing in the mud.

questions.question_text: Which one lays eggs on the farm? (Vocabulary question)
Fill in the blank: It says ___. (Grammar question)
True or False: A pig can fly. (Reading comprehension)
Where does the pig like to play? (Reading comprehension)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal has feathers and lays eggs?
Which animal is known for hopping?
Which animal has webbed feet and likes to swim?

steps.title: Morning on the Farm
steps.text: Good morning! I see the sun. That is a rooster. Is that a cow? It says Moo! The hen is laying eggs. I love my animals!

steps.audio_text: Look, is that a sheep? Yes, it is! The sheep says baa. And over there is a black horse. It runs very fast.

questions.question: What sound does the sheep make?

steps.prompt: Say: That is a cow. What does it say?
steps.expected_text: that is a cow it says moo

questions.question_text: Which animal says 'quack'? (Vocabulary question)
Complete the sentence: That is a ___. (Grammar question)
What color is the goat mentioned in the lesson? (Reading comprehension)
True or False: The sheep says 'baa'.
How many legs does a cow have? (General farm animal knowledge)
